description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has four jobs: build-linux, build-linux-win, build-linux-release, and macosx-bintray. Each job runs on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-16.04, and macos-latest respectively), checks out the repository, installs dependencies, configures, builds, and packages the Texstudio project.
